steps.title: Apply the triangle angle-sum theorem
steps.content:
The triangle has a right angle ($90°$), an angle of $13°$, and unknown angle $a$. Apply the triangle angle-sum theorem:
$$90° + 13° + a = 180°$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing angle
steps.content:
Solve for $a$:
$$a = 180° - 90° - 13° = 77°$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
